# L,D,&C Co-Op

**Status:** Disputed

Freelancer cooperative providing tech packs, patterns, and sample making.

## Contract Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| Start Date | October 1, 2025 |
| End Date | January 30, 2026 (auto-terminates) |
| Total Value | $3,400 |
| Deposit Paid | $1,570 (50%) |
| Payment Method | PayPal, Zelle, or check (to Caroline) |

### Deliverables

- 4 tech packs (one per style)
- 4 garment patterns (base size)
- Pattern card for all 4 styles
- 4 underwear samples in base size

### Key Terms

- 3 revisions included per design for tech packs/patterns
- Sample amendments generally not possible (physical work)
- Late fee: 2% per month on overdue invoices
- Delayed client feedback fee: 1% per week
- 7-day written notice required for termination
- Cancellation requires payment for completed work
